channel.title: Apps on Welcome to Enhook
channel.description: Recent content in Apps on Welcome to Enhook

item.title: ab-download-manager
item.description: A Download Manager that speeds up your downloads

item.title: Ai Toolbox
item.description: Personal AI Toolbox

item.title: All Api Hub
item.description: ​一站式 New-API/Sub2API 等中转站账号管理：余额/用量看板、自动签到、密钥一键使用、价格对比、可用性测试，另提供高级渠道管理 | All-in-one New-API/Sub2API account hub: balance/usage dashboard, auto check-in, one-click keys, price comparison, health checks, plus advanced channel management

item.title: android
item.description: Home Assistant Companion for Android

item.title: AnimeX
item.description: AnimeX 是一个基于 Mikan Project、Bangumi.tv 与多储存桶后端的番剧管理系统，支持自动追番、媒体库搜刮、在线播放、用户权限、管理员面板、下载申请、PikPak / 115 / 本地 / NAS 存储和 Docker 一体化部署。

item.title: BBDown
item.description: Bilibili Downloader. 一个命令行式哔哩哔哩下载器.

item.title: BestSub
item.description: Best Sub, Best for Your Net

item.title: Bili23 Downloader
item.description: Bili23-Downloader 是一款跨平台的 B 站视频下载工具，兼容 Windows（含 Win7）、Linux 和 macOS。它拥有现代化 UI，支持音视频流分离下载、多线程加速、弹幕与字幕获取、封面提取、元数据刮削等丰富功能，并可自定义文件命名与分类，满足多样化需求。

item.title: BiliBili Manga Downloader
item.description: 一个好用的哔哩哔哩漫画下载器，拥有图形界面，支持关键词搜索漫画和二维码登入，黑科技下载未解锁章节，多线程下载，多种保存格式，本地漫画管理，一键检查更新！

item.title: Bilibili Manga Watermark Remover
item.description: bilibili漫画 哔哩哔哩漫画 B漫 去水印工具(无痕 无损)，带图形界面，已打包exe

item.title: Bilibili Video Downloader
item.description: 哔哩哔哩 bilibili B站 视频 下载器，图形界面 + nfo刮削 + 广告标记 + 字幕下载 + 弹幕下载，轻松将视频加入emby等媒体库

item.title: BMCU-C-PJARCZAK
item.description: BMCU 370C (Hall) firmware for Bambu Lab A1 / A1 mini / P1S with buffer calibration - all known issues fixed, 100% AMS-compatible behavior.

item.title: Breeze
item.description: Breeze 是一个漫画阅读器，通过插件提供漫画支持，现支持哔咔，禁漫，ehentai。采用 Flutter 开发。

item.title: Bulk Crap Uninstaller
item.description: Remove large amounts of unwanted applications quickly.

item.title: camoufox
item.description: 🦊 Anti-detect browser

item.title: Catime
item.description: 💌A tiny (995KB) but mighty timer in pure C ! — almost no memory usage!❤️‍🔥 Supports clock, countdown, stopwatch, Pomodoro, and fully customizable tray animations (GIFs, CPU/Mem%) 💘 Don’t be shy, join here🧸: https://discord.com/invite/W3tW2gtp6g

item.title: CC Desktop Zh Cn WIN Portable
item.description: A Windows open-source project collected from linux.do: CC Desktop Zh Cn WIN Portable.

item.title: cc-switch
item.description: A cross-platform desktop All-in-One assistant tool for Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, openclaw & Gemini CLI.

item.title: Ccpane
item.description: Multi-instance split-pane manager for Claude Code — a cross-platform desktop app built with Tauri 2

item.title: Cherry Studio
item.description: AI productivity studio with smart chat, autonomous agents, and 300+ assistants. Unified access to frontier LLMs

item.title: clashmi
item.description: Clash Mihomo for iOS/MacOS/Android/Windows/Linux

item.title: cli
item.description: GitHub’s official command line tool

item.title: ClickShow
item.description: 鼠标点击特效

item.title: codebase-memory-mcp
item.description: High-performance code intelligence MCP server. Indexes codebases into a persistent knowledge graph — average repo in milliseconds. 66 languages, sub-ms queries, 99% fewer tokens. Single static binary, zero dependencies.

item.title: Codex Manager
item.description: 一个Codex cli 账号管理与切换工具。为 Codex cli提供本地网关转发。

item.title: Copymanga Downloader
item.description: 拷贝漫画 copymanga 的多线程下载器，带图形界面 带收藏夹 支持下载下架的漫画 支持导出cbz和pdf，已打包exe 没有每分钟15次API请求的限制 下载速度飞快

item.title: cs2-dumper
item.description: Counter-Strike: 2 Offset Dumper

item.title: curl
item.description: A command line tool and library for transferring data with URL syntax, supporting DICT, FILE, FTP, FTPS, GOPHER, GOPHERS, HTTP, HTTPS, IMAP, IMAPS, LDAP, LDAPS, MQTT, MQTTS, POP3, POP3S, RTMP, RTMPS, RTSP, SCP, SFTP, SMB, SMBS, SMTP, SMTPS, TELNET, TFTP, WS and WSS. libcurl offers a myriad of powerful features

item.title: Done Hub
item.description: A Windows open-source project collected from linux.do: Done Hub.

item.title: ExplorerTabUtility
item.description: 🚀 Supercharge Windows 11’s File Explorer: Auto-convert windows to tabs, duplicate tabs, reopen closed ones, and more!

item.title: Feather
item.description: Free on-device iOS/iPadOS application manager/installer, using certificates part of the Apple Developer Program.

item.title: FinceptTerminal
item.description: FinceptTerminal is a modern finance application offering advanced market analytics, investment research, and economic data tools, designed for interactive exploration and data-driven decision-making in a user-friendly environment.

item.title: FlClash
item.description: A multi-platform proxy client based on ClashMeta,simple and easy to use, open-source and ad-free.

item.title: gkd
item.description: 基于无障碍，高级选择器，订阅规则的自定义屏幕点击安卓应用 | An Android APP with custom screen tapping based on Accessibility, Advanced Selectors, and Subscription Rules

item.title: Golutra
item.description: Multi-agent AI orchestration platform for automation, workflows, and developer tools. Golutra transforms Codex, Claude Code, and OpenClaw into a unified agent system with parallel execution, task orchestration, long-running workflows, and AI productivity workspace.

item.title: hiddify-app
item.description: Multi-platform auto-proxy client, supporting Sing-box, X-ray, TUIC, Hysteria, Reality, Trojan, SSH etc. It’s an open-source, secure and ad-free.

item.title: Hitomi Downloader
item.description: A GUI-based multi-threaded downloader for hitomi hitomi.la 一个带GUI的用于 hitomi hitomi.la 的多线程下载器

item.title: Ice
item.description: Powerful menu bar manager for macOS

item.title: ImHex
item.description: 🔍 A Hex Editor for Reverse Engineers, Programmers and people who value their retinas when working at 3 AM.

item.title: iroh
item.description: IP addresses break, dial keys instead. Modular networking stack in Rust.

item.title: Jmcomic Downloader
item.description: 禁漫天堂 18comic.vip jmcomic 18comic 的多线程下载器，带图形界面 带收藏夹 免费下载收费的漫画，已打包exe 下载速度飞快

item.title: meshcore-open
item.description: Open-source Flutter client for MeshCore LoRa mesh networking devices

item.title: MinerU2PPT
item.description: High-fidelity tool to convert PDF files and images into fully editable PowerPoint presentations (.pptx). Unlike basic converters, it uses AI-powered structure extraction (MinerU) to accurately reconstruct text, layouts, and images, ensuring the output is not just a screenshot but a professional, modifiable document.

item.title: mpv
item.description: 🎥 Command line media player

item.title: mujoco
item.description: Multi-Joint dynamics with Contact. A general purpose physics simulator.

item.title: Myclaude
item.description: Multi-agent orchestration workflow (Claude Code Codex Gemini OpenCode)

item.title: netdata
item.description: The fastest path to AI-powered full stack observability, even for lean teams.

item.title: Nrfr
item.description: 🌍 免 Root 的 SIM 卡国家码修改工具 | 解决国际漫游时的兼容性问题，帮助使用海外 SIM 卡获得更好的本地化体验，解锁运营商限制，突破区域限制

item.title: OmniWM
item.description: MacOS Niri and Hyprland inspired tiling window manager that’s developer signed and notorized (safe for managed enterprise environments). Aiming for parity and extra innovation.

item.title: One Hub
item.description: OpenAI 接口管理 & 分发系统，改自songquanpeng/one-api。支持更多模型，加入统计页面，完善非openai模型的函数调用。

item.description: The Cursor for Designers • An Open-Source AI-First Design tool • Visually build, style, and edit your React App with AI

item.description: ONNX Runtime: cross-platform, high performance ML inferencing and training accelerator

item.description: OpenBLAS is an optimized BLAS library based on GotoBLAS2 1.13 BSD version.

item.description: 分布式CDN边缘节点, 由统一的控制中心对节点进行管控。

item.title: protobuf
item.description: Protocol Buffers - Google’s data interchange format

item.title: proxypin
item.description: Open source free capture HTTP(S) traffic software ProxyPin, supporting full platform systems

item.title: qdrant
item.description: Qdrant - High-performance, massive-scale Vector Database and Vector Search Engine for the next generation of AI. Also available in the cloudhttps://cloud.qdrant.io/

item.title: QKeyMapper
item.description: [按键映射工具] QKeyMapper，Qt开发Win10&Win11可用，不修改注册表、不需重新启动系统，可立即生效和停止。支持游戏手柄映射到键鼠，手柄摇杆控制鼠标移动，键鼠映射到虚拟游戏手柄，鼠标控制虚拟手柄移动摇杆等功能。

item.title: quarkdown
item.description: 🪐 Markdown with superpowers: from ideas to papers, presentations, websites, books, and knowledge bases.

item.title: raylib
item.description: A simple and easy-to-use library to enjoy videogames programming

item.title: redpanda
item.description: Redpanda is a streaming data platform for developers. Kafka API compatible. 10x faster. No ZooKeeper. No JVM!

item.title: rtk
item.description: CLI proxy that reduces LLM token consumption by 60-90% on common dev commands. Single Rust binary, zero dependencies

item.title: rustdesk
item.description: An open-source remote desktop application designed for self-hosting, as an alternative to TeamViewer.

item.title: Sam3 AN
item.description: 基于Meta sam3模型的数据标注工具

item.title: SDL
item.description: Simple DirectMedia Layer

item.title: servo
item.description: Servo aims to empower developers with a lightweight, high-performance alternative for embedding web technologies in applications.

item.title: Skill Flow
item.description: Install, manage, and share skills across every major coding agent — Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, and more.

item.title: Skills Dock
item.description: Skill-Dock 是一个专门对skill/map进行可视化管理的app，用来统一查看、发现和管理散落在不同工具中的 AI Skills。支持显示skill的调用次数、一键打包导入导出skill、skill分类管理，等等

item.title: sniffnet
item.description: Comfortably monitor your Internet traffic 🕵️‍♂️

item.title: spotube
item.description: 🎧 Open source music streaming app! Available for both desktop & mobile!

item.title: Sqlearner
item.description: Learn SQL by yourself. Step by step. 闯关交互式SQL自学，从零基础开始进阶，祝你一路过关斩将！

item.title: sublinkPro
item.description: ✨ 现代化代理订阅管理平台 | 🏷️智能标签自动分类 ⚡专业测速 🔗链式代理中转 ✈️机场流量监控 🤖TG远程管理 📜JS脚本扩展 | Go+React 全新UI，移动端友好！

item.title: SubRenamer
item.description: 🎞 字幕文件批量改名和自动调轴工具 | Batch rename subtitle files to match video names with one-click.

item.title: Sunshine
item.description: Self-hosted game stream host for Moonlight.

item.title: Super Productivity
item.description: Super Productivity is an advanced todo list app with integrated Timeboxing and time tracking capabilities. It also comes with integrations for Jira, GitLab, GitHub and Open Project.

item.title: syft
item.description: CLI tool and library for generating a Software Bill of Materials from container images and filesystems

item.title: SyncNos
item.description: SyncNos is an open-source web clipper that saves AI chats, web articles, and video transcripts into Notion or Obsidian.

item.title: systeminformer
item.description: A free, powerful, multi-purpose tool that helps you monitor system resources, debug software and detect malware. Brought to you by Winsider Seminars & Solutions, Inc. @http://www.windows-internals.com

item.title: Tactus
item.description: The first browser AI Agent extension to support Agent Skills, enabling AI to perform complex tasks through an expandable skill system. 🌟 Star if you like it! | 首个支持 Agent Skills 的浏览器 AI Agent 扩展，让 AI 通过可扩展技能系统执行复杂任务 🌟 如果喜欢请点个 Star！

item.title: TaskManagerEx
item.description: Windows XP’s Task Manager with more features

item.title: typst
item.description: A markup-based typesetting system that is powerful and easy to learn.

item.title: Umi OCR
item.description: OCR software, free and offline. 开源、免费的离线OCR软件。支持截屏/批量导入图片，PDF文档识别，排除水印/页眉页脚，扫描/生成二维码。内置多国语言库。

item.description: A Windows open-source project collected from linux.do: Veloera.

item.title: Ventoy

item.title: zed
item.description: Code at the speed of thought – Zed is a high-performance, multiplayer code editor from the creators of Atom and Tree-sitter.
